systems.name: Irrigation system
notes: Coverage and zone layout should be verified before relying on summer irrigation.
Use soil moisture and weather, not calendar habit alone, to decide when to water.

systems.name: Backflow preventer
notes: Spring startup should account for freeze risk.
Store future inspection, startup, or winterization notes here.

systems.name: Mulch beds
notes: Large 2025 mulch purchase suggests review before automatically buying more.
Refresh based on bed condition, washout, color, and weed pressure.
